description_long: This object is a straight-bladed sword with a double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is long and flat, with a consistent width that narrows gradually toward the tip. The hilt features a simple crossguard that extends perpendicularly to the blade, providing hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and ends in a rounded pommel, which appears solid and unadorned. The entire object has a uniform dark metallic finish, suggesting it is forged from steel or a similar metal. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements on the blade, guard, or handle.
description: A straight, double-edged sword with a simple crossguard and a rounded pommel, all in a dark metallic finish. The design is plain and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from the flat side, showing the full length of the blade, crossguard, and rounded pommel.
description_view_1: The sword is viewed edge-on, making the blade appear as a thin line and highlighting the thickness of the blade and handle.
description_view_2: The opposite flat side of the sword is visible, mirroring view 0, with the blade, crossguard, and pommel clearly shown.
description_view_3: The sword is again viewed edge-on from the opposite side, showing the blade and handle as narrow profiles.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, solid, rounded pommel, plain metal
